title: COMMUNITY RESOURCE ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK SERENITY CLUB COMMUNITY RESOURCE ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers financial assistance in the form of gas or grocery gift cards. Limited gift cards are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Monthly bus passes for The Wave Tillamook may be available for people without other forms of transportation. 5012 3rd Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Must be participating in 12-step recovery Hours: 2nd Tuesday of the month Email (503) 842-1115 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-1115 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Bus passes require a valid email address. Call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Bus Fare * Substance Use Disorder Issues Food Vouchers * Substance Use Disorder Issues Gas Money * Substance Use Disorder Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK SERENITY CLUB
